strategy_notes: AGGRESSIVE / high-variance. With Haaland OUT (rested), Saka benched and Gabriel uncertain, the field's captaincy collapses onto a tiny pool — so I attack the gaps. CAPTAIN MATETA, a sub-15% contrarian armband: Crystal Palace at home with pens and elite penalty-box volume, while the template scrambles for a Haaland replacement. Double Palace attack (Mateta + Sarr) is the punt engine; Sarr (<8% EO) is the key differential. Semenyo and João Pedro add further low-template upside. 3-4-3 max-attack shape, Liverpool/Bournemouth defenders only for budget and clean-sheet lottery. Avoided all three flagged Arsenal assets entirely (Saka bench, Gabriel uncertain, and even Gyökeres carries final-day rotation risk but is kept as a high-ceiling starter, not captained). No chip in a single GW. Accept the variance — chasing rank swings, not protecting them.
